label: Archetype alignment streak tracking
description: Consecutive high-alignment conversations build streaks, reinforcing identity training.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Conversation ends with archetype alignment at or above 80%
causal_translation.rule_text: Consistency matters more than perfection — streaks track sustained effort
causal_translation.effect_text: User sees "5 conversations in a row as Ambassador" — sticky gamification
